subtitle: Cority PUG today 14:00 — raise smart notes. Org hierarchy + payroll report actions outstanding.
context: Your inbox script last ran Monday 15 June at 09:00 — this briefing has been manually updated for Tuesday 16 June. Your two confirmed meetings today are the PFST Data Assessment consultancy introduction with Thomas Harlos at 13:00 and the Cority Product User Group with Christopher Sanders at 14:00. Prepare talking points for the PUG now: ticket 00476764 / CCC-19664, 6+ months open, Mehran Riaz confirmed intentional behaviour, no roadmap commitment, Premium Support paywall. From yesterday's 1-1 with Michael, three new actions are live: Pay Code 121 / PAYPAY25 SQL update (needed for this month's payroll run), org hierarchy migration enabling 16 COREPORTAL_ADMIN menu options (review Asta Palmer's email first), and FP 68261303 Multi Company Setup response to Conor O'Brien. Julie Hickman's OneDrive export for the Chemistry bulk delete (case 68974493) is also still outstanding. James Salas returns 18 June.

prioritiesToday.text: Cority PUG prep -- smart notes CCC-19664
prioritiesToday.description: Smart notes in Cority CoreEHS+ (GX2) do not allow edits after save and close. Raised November 2025, dev ref CCC-19664. Cority's official position (confirmed 08 Jun 2026 by Mehran Riaz): INTENDED feature, classified as enhancement, NOT on roadmap. No timeline. Premium Support paywall for beta. No named account manager. Quality PUG is TODAY at 14:00 with Christopher Sanders.
actions: [TODO -- before 14:00] Prepare talking points: 6+ months open, intentional reclassification, no roadmap commitment, no account manager, Premium Support paywall.
[TODO -- PUG 14:00] Raise CCC-19664 formally with Christopher Sanders. Use Mehran Riaz response as evidence standard escalation is exhausted.
[TODO -- after PUG] Decide: pursue via sales/account route or accept as known limitation and communicate to stakeholders.

Change request to be raised.
